primary_method: adjusted tangible book plus explicit excess-return, capital-release and stress adjustments
weighting_rationale: Use the method matched to the economic claim. Treat specialist opinions as tests, not weights, and do not average incompatible methods.
agreed_facts: All material components have explicit low/base/high estimates and overlap controls.
disputed_facts: Segment tangible capital and through-cycle returns cannot be independently reproduced.
A CET1 walk from binding requirement through management buffer, stress loss and approved distributions is absent.
A common severe credit, funding, legal, operational and market stress bridge is absent.
recommendation: research_blocked; do not advance to a security decision until the critical acceptance tests are met.

operational_milestones: Publish or derive a stable segment tangible-capital and normalized RoTCE bridge.
Reconcile quarterly CET1 headroom and approved capital return.
Complete portfolio-level severe stress with post-stress CET1.
thesis_break_conditions: Normalized RoTCE remains below required tangible-equity return.
Post-stress CET1 falls below the binding requirement.
Capital release requires operating near the regulatory floor.
